subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-09-13
subcodes.first_line: Sometimes I give away as much as $1,000, if I have it, but at another time I do not spend even a single dollar. This is so that affairs are regulated.
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی و لو هزار دولار موجود باشد می بخشم اما وقت دیگر یک دولار هم صرف نمیکنیم اینها محض نظم و ترتیب امور است
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
